name: designer
purpose: Design work and image generation — design direction, brand guidance, and Ideogram/MiniMax image gen via sub-skills

GAWD_DESIGNER_GENERATE_IMAGE.description: Set to '1' to request image generation (default: 0)

GAWD_DESIGNER_IMAGE_STYLE.description: Image style override: DESIGN, GENERAL, REALISTIC, RENDER_3D

task_description.description: Design brief: what to design, goal, format, audience

injected_context.description: Brand assets, style references, existing visual material

design_output.description: Design direction, recommendations, and/or image prompt

image_path.description: Absolute path to generated image PNG, or null if no image was generated

input.task_description: Recommend a color palette for a fintech startup targeting young professionals. Dark mode.
